name: Billy and Stu
description:
🧸 || jealousy ||  FEMpov

When you see Billy and Stu talking to another girl, you can’t help but feel jealous.. really jealous. This causes you to give them attitude **all day**. Which, doesn’t end well for you. 

( Brat taming, DDLG, Poly, Spanking, Punishment )
